%   $STORE/baselines/{intercomparison,<model>/eval}/...
% CRPSS reproduces figures/headline_8way_table.tex to <0.005 (per_variable_crpss_table.py
% logic). SSR = per-pixel Fortin (M+1)/M (per-baseline ssr_line CSVs). SSIM/LSD/FSS from
% the per-baseline by-lead CSVs (= intercomparison combined CSVs to machine precision).
% W1 from per-baseline wd_kde wasserstein (global); cells without that CSV yet = (pending).
% ES/VS/SIGK @240h are the published verified multivariate values (not recomputed here).
% 7-variable mean (3D vars averaged over 500/850 hPa first; LSD over the 3D vars).

           multi-metric calibration for the seven production baselines plus the
           classical IFS-ENS reference, the deployment-scale pendant to
           Tab.‾¥ref{tab:calibration}. Two lead blocks (120, 240¥,h); 7-variable
           mean (3D variables averaged over $¥ell¥in¥{500,850¥}$¥,hPa first; LSD over
           the five 3D variables). CRPSS$¥uparrow$, SSR ($¥to$1), SSIM$¥uparrow$,
           LSD$¥downarrow$, FSS¥,95¥%$¥uparrow$, $W_1¥downarrow$. The three multivariate
           scores ES$¥downarrow$, VS$_{0.5}¥downarrow$ and SIGK (signature-kernel score,
           lower is better; native scale, ranking only) are shown at 240¥,h only, their
           headline lead (appendix‾¥ref{sec:results-multivar}). ¥emph{(pending)} marks
